name: pwm-calc
description: Generic PWM frequency, duty-cycle, and error search tool. emb-agent core keeps only the abstract spec and does not include any vendor PWM-block implementation.
notes: Prefer problem-domain commands instead of cloning vendor GUIs.
emb core defines only the protocol; actual PWM formulas, register hints, and error search should come from external adapters.
Vendor/device bindings must not enter emb-agent core.
